content.title: Project 1 - Trip Board
content.description: Learned about how to create a webpage using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Created a trip board webpage that displays travel destinations and allows users to filter the results.

content.title: Project 2 - Flags Matching Game
content.description: Explored how to use jQuery to manipulate the DOM and create interactive web applications. Developed a flags matching game where players match country flags with their names.

content.title: Group Project -Short Cuts list
content.description: Excisised how to work on the team and use GitHub for version control. Collaborated with classmates to create a webpage that lists useful keyboard shortcuts for various applications.

content.title: Login Logic
content.description: Basic authentication using conditionals and local storage. Created a simple login page that validates user input and stores login information in the browser's local storage.

content.title: Filter Logic
content.description: Filter items dynamically using JavaScript. Developed a webpage that allows users to filter a list of items based on categories and search input.

content.title: Local Storage
content.description: Implementing local storage using JavaScript. Created a webpage that stores and retrieves data in the browser's local storage.
